Our Story

A Journey From Young Market Labourer to Trusted Wholesale Fruit Merchant

Built on Hard Work, Integrity, and Quality

N. Periyasamy was born and raised in Murukkankudi Village, Perambalur District, Tamil Nadu — the eldest among four brothers and one sister in a humble family. At just 10 years old, he moved to Chennai in search of a better future and began working as a labourer in the wholesale fruit market.

He soon became known for his hard work, discipline and dedication. Despite severe financial hardship and the responsibility of raising four daughters, he never lost sight of his dream — learning every aspect of the wholesale fruit business year after year, and earning the trust of customers and suppliers along the way.

After more than three decades of perseverance, that dream became reality. At the age of 43, in 2011, he established N. Periyasamy Fruits at the Koyambedu Wholesale Market, Chennai.

One principle has stayed unchanged since day one: never compromise on quality. Every fruit we supply reflects that commitment to freshness, honesty and customer satisfaction — the same values that have built lasting relationships with our customers and a reputation for reliability.

"Today, N. Periyasamy Fruits stands as a testament to the belief that determination, integrity, and consistent quality can turn humble beginnings into a trusted legacy."

Our Product

What We Trade

Two crops, chosen deliberately — both grown in Tamil Nadu's cooler hill belts and both increasingly in demand across Chennai's wholesale and modern trade.

Hill Banana

மலை வாழை

Grown in the cooler hill belts of Tamil Nadu, hill banana carries a distinct aroma and sweetness that plains-grown varieties don't match. A favourite with sweet-makers, hotels and premium fruit retailers across Chennai.

Grades: A · B Packed: Bunches & crates Year-round, subject to arrivals
Enquire for bulk rate

Avocado

One of the fastest-growing categories in Chennai's fruit trade. We source avocado from hill orchards and supply it fresh to retailers and modern-trade buyers looking for a dependable wholesale counter.

Grades: A · B Packed: Boxes & crates Seasonal — call to confirm
Enquire for bulk rate

Why Buy From Us

Built for Bulk Buyers

Direct Hill Sourcing

We buy straight from hill-belt growers, cutting out the layers between farm and counter.

Consistent Grading

Every lot is sorted by grade before it reaches your crate — no surprises at unloading.

Fair Wholesale Pricing

Rates track the market honestly. Call for today's number, not a guess.

Daily Fresh Arrivals

New stock every trading day — we don't hold ageing fruit to move volume.

Bulk-Ready Supply

From a few crates to a full truck-load, we're set up for wholesale quantities.

A known counter in the market since 2011 — ask around before you buy.
